hooks.hook_text: POV: You're hiking with kids who think they've discovered actual giants living in the forest
hooks.visual_suggestion: Close-up of wide-eyed children pointing up at massive troll towering above trees

hooks.hook_text: POV: Your GPS dies but you find something worth 10x more than your destination
hooks.visual_suggestion: Phone showing 'no signal' then pan up to reveal 40ft troll made from reclaimed wood

hooks.hook_text: POV: You followed cryptic clues through the woods and found this waiting for you
hooks.visual_suggestion: First-person view walking through forest, then dramatic reveal of hidden troll sculpture

hooks.hook_text: POV: You're explaining to friends why you drove 3 hours to 'meet' someone named Bjørn
hooks.visual_suggestion: Person gesturing excitedly next to massive wooden troll with nameplate reading 'Bjørn'

hooks.hook_text: When you realize this 'art installation' is actually staring back at you
hooks.visual_suggestion: Slow zoom on person's shocked expression, then cut to troll's carved face with lifelike eyes

hooks.hook_text: Nobody prepared me for how MASSIVE these forest guardians actually are
hooks.visual_suggestion: Wide shot showing tiny humans at base of 50ft troll for scale

hooks.hook_text: My jaw dropped when I realized what 15,000 pieces of scrap wood could become
hooks.visual_suggestion: Time-lapse style cuts from pile of recycled materials to finished giant troll

hooks.hook_text: Did you know 170+ giant trolls are hiding in forests across 6 continents right now?
hooks.visual_suggestion: World map animation showing troll locations lighting up across continents

hooks.hook_text: Did you know each troll is built from 100% recycled materials and has its own backstory?
hooks.visual_suggestion: Split screen: recycled wood pile transforming, then troll with story placard

hooks.hook_text: This treasure hunt ends December 15th. Miss it, wait 2 years for the next one.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Countdown timer overlay on mysterious forest path leading to troll silhouette

hooks.hook_text: Only 847 families found all 6 trolls last year. Will yours be next?
hooks.visual_suggestion: Collage of families celebrating with completion certificates at different troll locations

hooks.hook_text: While you scroll, families are out there collecting troll stamps. Last weekend to join them.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Split screen: person scrolling phone vs families hiking with treasure maps

hooks.hook_text: Challenge: Find the troll that's camouflaged so well, 73% of visitors walk past it
hooks.visual_suggestion: Hidden troll reveal - looks like natural rock formation until camera angle shifts

hooks.hook_text: Can you spot the troll that took 2,847 recycled pallets to build?
hooks.visual_suggestion: Aerial view of forest with massive troll barely visible among trees

hooks.hook_text: Challenge accepted: Visit all 6 trolls in one day. Current record holder did it in 4.5 hours.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Fast-paced montage of car driving between locations with timer running
